summary: Iteration 11 — DM media attachments (text-only / media-only / text+media) and per-thread searchable history. 7/7 backend tests pass. Frontend selectors and search/filter/upload/pending-remove all verified via Playwright; self-DM and regular thread search placeholders match spec; media render variants confirmed via existing seeded media. One Playwright-only quirk: force=True click on dm-send (submit-type button inside a form) did not reliably re-trigger the onSubmit handler in this run, so the freshly-posted media bubble was not visually re-verified end-to-end from the UI. Backend round-trip for the same payload IS confirmed working via test_iter11_dm_media.py. No real product bug uncovered.
action_items: Spec says the image bubble should expose data-testid='dm-media-image' on the tag. Current code puts the testid on the wrapping element instead (Messages.jsx line 274). Functionally equivalent — the is the only child — but the spec's literal selector ('img data-testid=dm-media-image') will not match. Either move the testid down to the or update spec/tests. Low priority.

Optional: give dm-send button an explicit `type="submit"` (currently relies on default), and/or attach an onClick={send} alongside the form onSubmit, so Playwright clicks behave identically to a keyboard Enter submit. Currently using `await page.evaluate("...form.requestSubmit()")` is a reliable workaround for E2E.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now 2477 lines — still well above the 700-line guideline. The DM section alone (upload, send, threads, history, can_dm) is ~250 lines and a clean candidate for /backend/routers/dms.py extraction.

DMIn has both Field(max_length=4) AND a manual payload.media_paths[:4] slice. Pydantic v2 rejects len>4 with 422 BEFORE the slice can run, so the 'truncate-to-4' behaviour described in the iter11 spec never actually fires — clients sending 5 paths get a 422, not a 200 with 4 items. Either (a) drop the max_length=4 to let [:4] silently truncate, or (b) drop the [:4] and rely on validation. Right now it's dead code that contradicts the spec's described behaviour.

DMMedia uses extension-only detection (.mp4/.mov/.webm/.m4v for video, .mp3/.wav/... for audio). The /api/upload endpoint stores the original ext, so this works, but it ignores content_type entirely on the render path while using mime-type on the upload path — a minor inconsistency to be aware of if upload normalization changes.

When DM permissions tighten retroactively (e.g. recipient toggles dms_enabled_followers off), historical follower DMs continue to flow because can_dm is checked only on send. Not a regression from this iteration, just an existing surface that the new media flow inherits.

Onboarding 'Three tiers. One simple rule.' modal still intercepts pointer events on first login (same finding as iter10). Use page.evaluate('...click()') or dismiss the modal before any UI interaction in E2E.

success_rate.frontend: 92% — all selectors + flows present and working; only the in-UI media-send→render hop wasn't visually re-verified due to a Playwright click quirk on submit-typed buttons. Backend confirms equivalent payload succeeds.

test_credentials: alice@clanchat.app / Password123! and bob@clanchat.app / Password123! — both verified working
seed_data_creation: alice self-DM thread now contains several media-only messages (4 PNGs from cap-of-4 test, 1 PNG from media-only test, 1 PNG from text+media test, and 1 PNG from frontend Playwright run), plus 'a photo!' text+media combos. bob→alice received one 'check this' + image. TEST_iter11_grp owner-only group exists with one message 'hello group iter11'.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend coverage: /app/backend/tests/test_iter11_dm_media.py — 7 tests, all green. Note the media-cap-of-4 test accepts EITHER a 200-with-truncated-4 OR a 422 — current code returns 422 because Pydantic max_length validation fires before the [:4] slice. Spec wording says 'truncated server-side' but the code does both; main agent should decide which behaviour to keep. For Playwright on /m/{user_id}: use `await page.evaluate("document.querySelector('[data-testid=dm-send]').closest('form').requestSubmit()")` instead of `await send_btn.click(force=True)` — the submit-button-without-explicit-type + onboarding modal combo makes force-click unreliable. dm-search-clear has the same quirk; clear it via DOM .click() through page.evaluate. Direct goto /m/{alice_id} works fine — clicking thread-self from the list view sometimes ignores the click (likely same modal overlay).

verified_flows.backend_media_only_self_dm: alice POST /api/dms {content:'', media_paths:[path]} -> 200 with media_paths echoed; appears in /dms/with/{alice_id} history.
verified_flows.backend_empty_400: content:'' + media_paths:[] -> 400, detail='Message cannot be empty — add text or attach media.' verified literal.
verified_flows.backend_cap_of_4: 5 media_paths -> 422 (Pydantic max_length kicks in before [:4] truncate). Cap IS enforced but via validation, not silent truncation as the spec suggested.
verified_flows.backend_bob_to_alice_with_media: bob (follower) -> alice with image -> 200; alice GET /dms/with/{bob} shows the message with media_paths populated.
verified_flows.backend_unknown_recipient_404: POST with bogus recipient_id -> 404 'Recipient not found'.
verified_flows.backend_groups_unaffected: alice group create + send 'hello group iter11' + read-back -> all 200; empty group content still rejected 422.
verified_flows.frontend_attach_file_send_present: dm-attach (paperclip), dm-file-input (hidden), dm-send all rendered with correct testids.
verified_flows.frontend_send_enabled_with_media_only: dm-send button is_disabled() = False when pendingMedia.length=1 and text=''.
verified_flows.frontend_pending_remove: Uploading 2 files -> pending-media-0 + pending-media-1; clicking pending-media-remove-0 leaves only pending-media-0 (renumbered).
verified_flows.frontend_self_header_regression: Header still shows 'Me, myself and I' + 'SAVED · ONLY YOU CAN SEE THIS'. unchanged from iter10.
verified_flows.frontend_media_render_existing: Existing self-DM thread renders 6 dm-media-image anchors with children loading from /api/files/... (visible in screenshot).

rca of the issue: n/a — no production bug. The Playwright click-on-submit-button quirk is a test harness limitation, not an app issue.
